overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a coastal path at night. The character passes a twisted, glowing tree and transitions from ancient cobblestone ruins to grassy wilderness and finally into a forested valley trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cobblestone ruins approaching a twisted tree

events.description: character begins ascending slight incline toward the twisted tree

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward a large twisted tree with red glowing elements

entered.detail: Large gnarled tree with red glowing elements at the top, silhouetted against the night sky
Ancient weathered stone walls and broken architectural structures
Dark water visible along the coastline to the left
Weathered stone paving stones forming the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an elevated cobblestone path beside the coast at night, approaching a distinctive twisted tree with glowing red elements. Ancient stone ruins line the right side of the path while the dark sea is visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cobblestone path passing the twisted tree

events.description: passes the twisted glowing tree, which moves out of view to the right
turns left away from the coastal path toward grassy inland terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues past the tree along the coast, then veers left onto grassy slopes

entered.detail: Broken wooden fence or barrier remnants along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the twisted tree and continues along the coastal cobblestone path. The ancient ruins fall behind as the character turns inland, leaving the water behind and approaching grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered rocks and bushes

events.description: steps off cobblestone path onto grassy hillside terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking uphill through tall grass and rocky outcrops, moving away from the coast

entered.detail: Tall green grass covering the uneven hillside ground
Large boulders and rocky formations scattered on the slope
Dense shrubbery and undergrowth on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Leaving the cobblestone path behind, Geralt traverses a grassy hillside covered in tall vegetation and scattered rocks. The coastal water disappears from view as the character moves inland and uphill through the natural terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with rock walls

events.description: returns to a defined dirt path entering a forested valley

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a narrow forested valley with rock walls

entered.detail: Narrow dirt trail winding through the forested valley
Steep rocky cliff face rising alongside the path
Tall coniferous trees forming a dense forest canopy

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a defined dirt path cutting through a dense forest valley. Tall pine trees rise on both sides while a steep rock wall runs along the right side of the trail, creating an enclosed, winding passage through the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a moonlit coastal ruin into the enclosed depths of a forested valley. It begins with Geralt walking along an elevated cobblestone path beside the dark sea, passing ancient stone ruins and a distinctive twisted tree with glowing red elements. As the character moves forward, the ruins fall behind and the path turns inland, shifting the environment from weathered stone to a grassy hillside covered in tall vegetation and scattered rocks. The coastal water then disappears from view as the camera climbs uphill through the natural terrain, finally emerging onto a defined dirt path. This trail winds through a dense forest of tall pine trees, flanked by a steep rock wall that creates a secluded passage through the wilderness.
